title: Unity Software (NYSE:U) Stock Forecast & Analyst Predictions
text: Growth Forecast: Unity Software is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 49.1% and 11.4% per annum respectively, with EPS expected to grow by 63.3% per annum over the next 5 years. Analyst Coverage: 23 analysts that cover Unity Software stock have a consensus rating of Buy and an average price target of $36.43, which forecasts an 83.53% increase in the stock price over the next year. Current Investment Thesis: The bullish outlook is supported by several factors: Vector platform success, subscription revenue growth momentum, path to GAAP profitability, and strategic repositioning under new leadership. Recent Analyst Upgrades: In the month of May 2026, U has received 20 Buy Ratings, 6 Hold Ratings, and 0 Sell Ratings from analysts, indicating strong consensus for positive outlook. Risk Factors: Analysts note execution risk on profitability targets, competitive dynamics in ad tech space, and potential macro headwinds in advertising and gaming sectors. Risk/Reward: Despite risks, the risk-reward profile appears favorable given the combination of growth visibility, margin expansion, and valuation relative to growth rates.
